**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the system-level industry mutation map and the 'advertising media' core gene recombination probe. The highly homogenized and baseless Apple electronic OEM matrix in the original data has been completely short-circuited. This is an enterprise with a highly dramatic commercial record: currently named 'Runjiang Zhihui Display Technology,' it is officially classified as the high-tech 'Electronic Device Manufacturing / Display Device Manufacturing.' However, the forensic logic engine directly intercepted its past and present: its former name was 'Nanjing Runjiang Zhihui Cultural Media Co., Ltd.' Combined with its 8 insured employees, a paid-in capital of 1.372 million, and the highest-ranking business sequence in its license ('advertising design, production, agency; graphic design; advertising release'), a chain of commercial mutation with strong Chinese characteristics clearly emerges. This is absolutely not a high-tech 'display technology' major plant capable of producing LCD panels or OLEDs. This is a pure '8-Employee Ad Agency & LED Screen Contractor.' To facilitate getting engineering projects or to freeload on the policies of high-tech parks, the boss changed the company name from 'Cultural Media' to 'Display Technology,' and crazily injected 'display device manufacturing, artificial intelligence software development' into the latter half of the business license. In reality, these 8 people are highly likely advertising designers, salespersons, and a few construction and installation workers. Their so-called 'display technology' is buying ready-made LED modules from real electronic factories, assembling them into outdoor advertising big screens or conference room displays for clients, while concurrently taking on related advertising production and release businesses. The system has completely shattered its illusory 'manufacturing entity' tag, restoring its true ecological niche as an 'advertising media and large screen engineering service provider.'
